beats: Visitor pauses at entrance, reading notice board with health and item restrictions

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 进入车间前，请确认自身状态。如有明显感冒、咳嗽、发热，或身上有明显异味、粉尘、油污等情况，不建议进入洁净区域。随身物品请按要求存放，食品、饮料、纸箱、普通纸张等易产尘物品不得带入车间。

prompt.positive: 16:9 medium shot, visitor reading notice board at clean room entrance, notice board with health guidelines and prohibited items list, bright overhead lighting, slightly low angle, photorealistic, highly detailed, 8K, industrial documentary style
prompt.negative: blurry, low quality, distorted faces, wrong proportions, text artifacts, watermark, logo, extra limbs, dark lighting, cluttered background

_video_prompt.prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: 洁净车间入口. 门禁系统, 车间标识牌, 告示栏, 洁净通道入口. lighting: 明亮白光，工业照明. character (visitor_group): hair fully covered by cleanroom cap, white cleanroom suit, mask, cleanroom shoes or shoe covers, visitor badge + no exposed personal items. prop (warning_signage): state: displayed, visually consistent. Visitor pauses at entrance, reading notice board with health and item restrictions. Narration: "进入车间前，请确认自身状态。如有明显感冒、咳嗽、发热，或身上有明显异味、粉尘、油污等情况，不建议进入洁净区域。随身物品请按要求存放，食品、饮料、纸箱、普通纸张等易产尘物品不得带入车间。". Camera motion: medium shot, subtle hand-held camera feel, focus on subject action. 16:9 medium shot, visitor reading notice board at clean room entrance, notice board with health guidelines and prohibited items list, bright overhead lighting, slightly low angle, photorealistic, highly detailed, 8K, industrial documentary style. Shot-to-shot continuity: maintain identical character identity, scene layout, lighting and prop positions as established in previous shot. Visual style must match preceding frame. Do not introduce new visual elements not present in the reference images. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation.. Scene layout locked to context reference frame. Do not reposition props or alter lighting source.. All props match reference images exactly. Prop must_keep: shape, color, size, material unchanged.. Camera transition smooth from previous shot continuity frame. No abrupt jump cut between shots. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.
_video_prompt.negative: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), 杂乱物品, 敞开大门, 普通衣物, blurry, low quality, distorted faces, wrong proportions, text artifacts, watermark, logo, extra limbs, dark lighting, cluttered background, multiple characters, duplicate person, clone, inconsistent lighting, wrong angle, lens distortion, chromatic aberration, face morphing, character drift, outfit change, prop mutation, scene layout shift, extra fingers, distorted limbs, text artifacts, burnt-in subtitles, logo, watermark, motion blur excessive, flickering, framing jump cut
_video_prompt.motion: medium shot, subtle hand-held camera feel, focus on subject action
_video_prompt.tool_hint: Copy "prompt" and "negative" into video generation tool. Upload "condition_images" for img2vid start/end frame conditioning if supported. "context_ref_images" are previous shot keyframes for visual continuity. Duration is a guideline.
